notes: Step B: host-less cabs show a grouped cabling list instead of a misleading empty rack. The ~215 cable-endpoint-only cabs (patch panels, OOB, spine/leaf) previously resolved in lookup with empty hosts[] and rendered a blank 48U ladder. Now: master_findRack carries cablesOut/cablesIn through to render (read-only store refs; the data already persisted, was just dropped at the bridge). New shared master_renderHit(mHit, container) routes both fall-through sites (rackViewer_request + rmSearch) so they can't diverge: hosts present -> elevation (unchanged); host-less with cables -> grouped cabling list; host-less zero-cable -> quiet re-import fallback (never fires on real data). Cabling list is SUMMARIZED + GROUPED + capped, never a flat dump: summary band (CABLING-ONLY badge + total), direction line, OUT/IN sections grouped by far-end cab (spatial sort), capped at MASTER_CAP_GROUPS=12 with mandatory visible '+N more', lazy inline accordion drill-down capped at MASTER_CAP_CABLES=50. Verified against real SPK03: worst case s4:010 (1,631 cables) renders 17 default-view group rows, NOT a wall; all 215 host-less cabs bounded; drill-down on s3:137 (154 cables) shows 50 + '+104 more'; default view builds 0 cable rows until tapped. CSS uses existing :root tokens (--raj/--slate/--slate-readable/--fs-body, all confirmed defined). Rule 1 honored (all rows width:100%, box-sizing:border-box, ellipsis-truncate; no horizontal overflow). Additive only: hosted-cab elevation, host-dns lookup, and legacy paths unchanged. Verified: both inline scripts node --check OK, CSS balanced, three stamps aligned at v1.6.61.
